SQLLite.SQL: UPDATE DEBT_DIVIDENDS DD SET DD.DD_TOTAL_PO = DECODE(${param.print},'N',NULL,${param.po_total}) , DD.DD_PO_NUMBER = DECODE(${param.print},'N',NULL,${param.po_number}) , DD.DD_PAYEE_DETAILS = ${param.payee_name}||' '|| DECODE(${param.print},'N','[ADDRESS UNKNOWN]'||${param.caduReportId}, ${param.payeeAddr1}||' '|| ${param.payeeAddr2}||' '|| DECODE(${param.payeeAddr3},NULL,NULL,${param.payeeAddr3}||' ')|| DECODE(${param.payeeAddr4},NULL,NULL,${param.payeeAddr4}||' ')|| DECODE(${param.payeeAddr5},NULL,NULL,${param.payeeAddr5}||' ')|| DECODE(${param.payeePostcode},NULL,NULL,${param.payeePostcode}||' ')|| DECODE(${param.payeeReference},NULL,NULL,${param.payeeReference}||' ')|| ${param.payeeDx}) , DD.CREATED = 'Y' , DD.DD_PPL_NUMBER = NULL WHERE DD.DD_SEQ = ${param.debtDividendSeq}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
